title: PM operating rhythm automation
hypothesis: If ProductOS keeps structured workspace state current, it can generate high-quality PM coordination outputs with much less manual reconstruction work.
positioning_hypothesis: ProductOS should behave like the PM operating layer that makes recurring coordination outputs reviewable and traceable.
offering_hypothesis: The offering should behave as a workflow and decision layer rather than a generic all-in-one PM suite.
wedge_hypothesis: Reducing manual reconstruction in recurring PM rhythms is the sharpest wedge for the current ProductOS posture.
why_now: PM operating load is rising while AI-assisted drafting shifts the bar toward judgment and trusted automation.
why_us: ProductOS already centers structured workflow state, traceability, and validation instead of isolated drafting.
advantage_hypothesis: The combination of workflow memory and reliability controls can make automation trusted enough for real operating work.

prioritization.priority_rationale: The concept packages the PM operating-rhythm problem into the bounded wedge that should drive the next delivery slice.
prioritization.reviewer_handoff: PM should confirm the concept stays within the current evidence-backed claim boundary before broader packaging or delivery expansion.

must_be_true_assumptions: PMs will trust a structured first draft if traceability is visible
The workflow can fit around existing tools instead of replacing them first
open_questions: What minimum source coverage is required before the PM trusts an automated draft?
risk_summary: The concept becomes weak if ProductOS broadens beyond the bounded PM operating-rhythm wedge too early.
Handoff quality will degrade if the concept loses the explicit persona and evidence spine.
handoff_readiness_summary: The concept is reviewable and ready for PM judgment before the execution slice broadens.
